---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug or unexpected behavior in DevNexus
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🐛 Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the bug. What went wrong? -->

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce

<!-- Provide a minimal, reproducible set of steps. -->

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

<!-- What did you expect to happen? -->

## ❌ Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happened? Include any error messages or stack traces. -->

```
Paste error output here if applicable
```

## 🖥️ Environment

| Field              | Value                          |
|--------------------|--------------------------------|
| OS                 | <!-- e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11 --> |
| Browser / Version  | <!-- e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125 --> |
| Node.js version    | <!-- e.g. 20.x -->             |
| Python version     | <!-- e.g. 3.11 -->             |
| DevNexus version   | <!-- e.g. 0.1.0 or commit SHA --> |
| Deployment         | <!-- local / staging / production --> |

## 📸 Screenshots / Screen Recording

<!-- If applicable, drag-and-drop screenshots or a screen recording here to help explain the problem. -->

## 📋 Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. related issues, recent PRs, config changes). -->

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have included all information needed to reproduce the bug.
- [ ] I have attached relevant screenshots or logs.
